Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. From birds to brains: My path to the fusiform face area (2024) 34 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Computational Physics (2nd Edition) (2025) 104 upvotes, 13 comments
  3. Nanocode: The best Claude Code that $200 can buy in pure JAX on TPUs 155 upvotes, 24 comments
  4. A tail-call interpreter in (nightly) Rust 129 upvotes, 20 comments
  5. Show HN: I built a tiny LLM to demystify how language models work 22 upvotes, 1 comments
  6. Wavelets on Graphs via Spectral Graph Theory (2009) 26 upvotes, 2 comments
  7. Gemma 4 on iPhone 420 upvotes, 114 comments
  8. Employers use your personal data to figure out the lowest salary you'll accept 47 upvotes, 8 comments
  9. Running Gemma 4 locally with LM Studio's new headless CLI and Claude Code 193 upvotes, 53 comments
  10. Eight years of wanting, three months of building with AI 618 upvotes, 200 comments
  11. The Mechanics of Steins Gate (2023) [pdf] 39 upvotes, 8 comments
  12. Caveman: Why use many token when few token do trick 701 upvotes, 313 comments
  13. Friendica – A Decentralized Social Network 129 upvotes, 48 comments
  14. Baby's Second Garbage Collector 56 upvotes, 17 comments
  15. LÖVE: 2D Game Framework for Lua 204 upvotes, 89 comments
  16. OpenJDK: Panama 37 upvotes, 11 comments
  17. Music for Programming 108 upvotes, 44 comments
  18. Microsoft hasn't had a coherent GUI strategy since Petzold 206 upvotes, 116 comments
  19. Spath and Splan 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  20. Show HN: Modo – I built an open-source alternative to Kiro, Cursor, and Windsurf 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  21. Endian wars and anti-portability: this again? 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  22. Show HN: Mdarena – Benchmark your Claude.md against your own PRs 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  23. Finnish sauna heat exposure induces stronger immune cell than cytokine responses 329 upvotes, 217 comments
  24. OpenAI's fall from grace as investors race to Anthropic 66 upvotes, 35 comments
  25. Show HN: YouTube search barely works, I made a search form with advanced filters 41 upvotes, 20 comments
  26. Artemis II crew see first glimpse of far side of Moon [video] 413 upvotes, 318 comments
  27. The Free Market Lie: Why Switzerland Has 25 Gbit Internet and America Doesn't 236 upvotes, 185 comments
  28. Apex Protocol – An open MCP-based standard for AI agent trading 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  29. In Japan, the robot isn't coming for your job; it's filling the one nobody wants 114 upvotes, 123 comments
  30. Recall – local multimodal semantic search for your files 6 upvotes, 2 comments
